headline: Capital One Brings Travel Platform In House To Deepen Cardholder Engagement
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) has taken full control of its travel portal by acquiring technology assets, supplier relationships, and key employees from Hopper. The move brings Capital One Travel fully in-house and includes the launch of a dedicated Capital One travel app. For you as an investor, this development sits at the intersection of payments, rewards, and digital engagement, all central to Capital One’s card and customer franchise. Travel rewards remain a key battleground across...

headline: Citigroup and 5 More Bank Stocks Set to Thrive in a Choppy Market
summary: The sector has taken a hit this year. Now the stocks are starting to look like bargains. We found six with strong prospects.
